# LOCK IN — trailer-load.com

> LOCK IN is a free, browser-based warehouse trailer-loading training simulator. It plays like Tetris but models the real job: load integrity, weight and balance, hazmat segregation, non-conveyables, a dispatch clock, and safety incidents scored the way a dock supervisor would call them. Built by F-Keys (founder: Vince Gonzalez). Free forever for workers and students; an opt-in performance dashboard is the paid product for CTE programs, trade schools, and warehouse employers.

## Play
- [LOCK IN — the game](https://trailer-load.com/lock-in.html): The full trailer-loading simulator. Free, no login. Modes: Practice, Arcade, Tour (levels), Daily, Gauntlet. Scored on integrity, density, pace, and safety; ranked Rookie to Yard Legend.
- [Smalls Sort](https://trailer-load.com/ss/): Companion mini-game — sort and stack small parcels. Speed and accuracy on the smalls line.

## For schools & employers
- [Program Dashboard](https://trailer-load.com/dashboard/): Facility-facing competency report. Each opted-in student's load integrity (attention to detail), completed walls (follow-through), throughput (pieces/hour), and safety incidents. Sortable, searchable, CSV export. Built for CTE (Perkins-eligible), trade schools, and warehouse ops teams.
- [Home / overview](https://trailer-load.com/): What LOCK IN is, how it works, and the free-for-workers / paid-dashboard-for-facilities model.

## Policies
- [Privacy Policy](https://trailer-load.com/privacy.html): How gameplay data, accounts, student/minor data (FERPA-aware), and facility dashboards are handled.
- [Terms of Service](https://trailer-load.com/terms.html): Free gameplay, facility dashboards, acceptable use, and disclaimers.

## About
LOCK IN is a training *supplement* — it builds loading intuition and tracks readiness. It does NOT replace employer safety training, OSHA training, or any certification requirement. Made by F-Keys (https://www.f-keys.com/), founder Vince Gonzalez.
